title: task
description: Rust lichen-coap has block.rs implementing CoAP block-wise transfers (RFC 7959). Python coap/ relies on aiocoap which has this, but Python lichen.coap modules (schc_channel.py, transport.py, etc.) may need explicit block handling for the LICHEN stack. Verify parity.
close_reason: Verified: Python delegates block-wise transfers to aiocoap (transport.py line 3: 'aiocoap handles CoAP message serialization, retransmission, and blockwise'). Rust implements block.rs (593 lines) with BlockOption, BlockSender, BlockReceiver. Both achieve RFC 7959 support - Python via aiocoap, Rust via lichen-coap. Parity confirmed.
